title: Bridge Paper: Psychedelics, Meditation, and Self-Consciousness.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership as constructed percept.
**Phase context:** body representation, rubber hand illusion, multisensory integration, body ownership, bodily self

Paper: Psychedelics, Meditation, and Self-Consciousness.
DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2018.01475
Abstract: In recent years, the scientific study of meditation and psychedelic drugs has seen remarkable developments. The increased focus on meditation in cognitive neuroscience has led to a cross-cultural classification of standard meditation styles validated by functional and structural neuroanatomical data. Meanwhile, the renaissance of psychedelic research has shed light on the neurophysiology of altered states of consciousness induced by classical psychedelics, such as psilocybin and LSD, whose effec

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-11. Phase 2 (Physical De-solidification).
